name: Robin Leach's Mediterranean Eggplant Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Butter a deep baking dish that is 8-9 inches in diameter.
3. Season the eggplant with salt and pepper; set aside.
4. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
5. Add onions and cook for 10-15 minutes, or until softened but not browned. Set aside.
6. Place spinach in a saucepan; cover and cook over high heat for 3-5 minutes, or until wilted. Drain excess moisture.
7. Arrange half of the eggplant slices at the bottom of the dish.
8. Layer onions, spinach, tomatoes, and pesto sauce on top.
9. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients, finishing with pesto sauce.
10. Roll out pastry to 1/4-inch thickness; cover the casserole.
11. Place pastry over the casserole; form a raised edge or decorate if desired.
12. Bake for 50-60 minutes until golden brown and heated through.
13. Let stand for 15 minutes. Serve with crust pieces and top each serving with caviar.
